{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323184850EBC6A2F16066214820B5"}"},"total":278},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7326168801598620467","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很不错的文，总体来说各方面都很好，就是和女主的感情线让我有点雷，非常狗血，且无厘头，而且我不太喜欢这个女主的一些行为。虽然这个设定非常的怪，但是因为这是一篇男主权谋文，而不是单纯的言情小说，所以我还是看完了，瑕不掩瑜吧，这本书的节奏，剧情，人物的刻画都很好，特别是男主，我能感觉到他的成长，看见在男主统治下的宋朝变好变强，内心有欣慰有喜悦也有怅然若失。总而言之，还是非常值得一看的","text_exts":[{"e":83,"s":80,"text":"权谋文","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%9D%83%E8%B0%8B%E6%96%87&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774262930214820B5%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227326168801598620467%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227027023940182608899%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%9D%83%E8%B0%8B%E6%96%87%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1705757541,"group_id":"7027023940182608899","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzsIpN1MJLiunlTYgU1xTdE=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/69f43650c2284b258c40e905a788b43e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795959&x-signature=85xZVGyH0Qw5TuEuF2Y%2FXW%2FQSSE%3D","user_id":"572223075136295","user_name":"<(｀^´)>?"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"572223075136295","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7027023940182608899","book_info":{"abstract":"一扇奇特的门让赵尚来到了北宋，成为了宋仁宗唯一的儿子。
包拯奏曰：“陛下应稽前代之成败，验当今之得失，则宗社享无疆之休矣。”
赵尚笑曰：“朕不过是大宋的一个小卒子，还请爱卿费心。”
韩琦奏曰：“陛下应上承祖宗之命，下合黎民之力，与士大夫共天下。”
赵尚笑曰：“朕不过是大宋的一个小卒子，还请爱卿费心。”
狄青奏曰：“西夏，畜生之国也，请陛下允臣讨之。”
赵尚一拍桌子怒道：“一个字，干……”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/578c7a8056f8c3ac1f7193c43956ea02","author":"笔下照丹青","author_id":"","book_id":"7027023940182608899","book_name":"圣天子","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8e0e0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3539人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7027026797183271462","read_count":"3539","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1040908"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.3","serial_count":"487","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/cc85127cc402c9dabbddc03769d6c864~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779446930&x-signature=WBo6OXwQH%2FDGqxda3BV9VI%2Bk7bk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"246767230395373","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"594"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323184850EBC6A2F16066214820B5"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读21小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":11,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":4,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":74738,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":3443},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7036389024995001099","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"加油虽有点历史上的瑕疵但是还是比那些无脑的小说相比还是可以的如果想要成为神作就要再严谨点多学习学习别的关于宋朝的书我觉得作者可以看看 不扁平，语言描写也有趣，最重要的是没有在女色描写上过于下流，虽有些浑话但好歹适可而止，至少没有让我看的难以言喻。难得一个女生也爱看的书，反正我很喜欢。好评","text_exts":[{"e":7,"s":3,"text":"风起云涌","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%A3%8E%E8%B5%B7%E4%BA%91%E6%B6%8C&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774262930214820B5%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227112388174261453579%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227027023940182608899%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%A3%8E%E8%B5%B7%E4%BA%91%E6%B6%8C%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1655982028,"group_id":"7027023940182608899","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一条咸鱼","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8txZRsqX+KhNpZEUCQkxB8=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/bf7445da17fa47d5800e0a38cd7025e0~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792361&x-signature=cSFwlk46lyubbsYgCM%2BXPqtn83I%3D","user_id":"92889467001","user_name":"姬墨梧桐钰"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"92889467001","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1707636504,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7027023940182608899","book_info":{"abstract":"一扇奇特的门让赵尚来到了北宋，成为了宋仁宗唯一的儿子。
